channel.title: barefoot___wanderer
channel.description: DIY ЁЯкЪ Building my own container house тЪТя╕П Owner Builder Learning as I go ЁЯТк

item.title: Container home build update!!! тАж Window restoration complete т...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


Container home build update!!! тАж Window restoration complete тЬЕ Frames and casements that have glass, off getting double glazed glass installed тЬЕ Steels angle frames made for half of my windows тЬЕ These containers are about to start looking like a house and IтАЩm so bloody excited for it ЁЯШН

item.title: What are these pretty little steel frames? ЁЯдФтАж IтАЩm making ...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


What are these pretty little steel frames? ЁЯдФтАж IтАЩm making them for my timber windows to be installed into! ЁЯк╡ This not only gives back the structural integrity IтАЩm taking from the containers by cutting into them for windows but also gives the timber windows a nice and neat frame to be installed into! ЁЯШН

item.title: Did you know you can make Xanthorrhoea resin varnish in 3 simple...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


Did you know you can make Xanthorrhoea resin varnish in 3 simple steps? ЁЯдп Make sure you check the local laws in your area if your in Aus and if you arenтАЩt allowed to harvest (which is common) you can buy the Xanthorrhoea resin online ЁЯе░ IтАЩm applying to get a license to sell mine, fingers crossed and if I get it youтАЩll be the first to know! ЁЯМ▒

item.title: ItтАЩs Xanthorrhoea resin varnish time for the windows IтАЩve be...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


ItтАЩs Xanthorrhoea resin varnish time for the windows IтАЩve been restoring for what feels like a life time! ЁЯШЭ I couldnтАЩt be more happy with how it turned out! ItтАЩs high quality waterproof and termite resistant home made varnish straight from my homestead! Let me know if you want a reel on how to make it ЁЯШЭЁЯСЗ

item.title: It felt like this day would never come but here it is! I have fi...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


It felt like this day would never come but here it is! I have finally finished repairing and restoring my Jarrah timber windows for my container house! ЁЯдпЁЯШЭ Look I have no regrets IтАЩm a sucker for hard work and big time savings but IтАЩm just going to take this moment to say тАж тАж THANK F*** thats over! ЁЯШВЁЯджтАНтЩАя╕П

How much my timber mill cost VS how much IтАЩm saving by not buying timber ЁЯТ░ЁЯк╡

item.title: Easiest and most fun $6k - $8k IтАЩve ever saved ЁЯШЭ For refere...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


Easiest and most fun $6k - $8k IтАЩve ever saved ЁЯШЭ For reference IтАЩll be using these logs in my house as posts for the areas where I am making big cut outs or removing entire walls (thereтАЩs currently acroprops in their place at the moment ) IтАЩll also be using them for the porch roof IтАЩll be building around my container house over my wrap around deck ЁЯШН

item.description:

Rusty old marketplace fail тАФтАФтАФтАФтАФ> Brand new shed! With just a little bit of elbow grease added along the way ЁЯШЭ

item.title: This 1 tonne log was a worthy competitor for the Delica, even ra...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


This 1 tonne log was a worthy competitor for the Delica, even raising one of its tyres at one stage! ЁЯШЭЁЯджтАНтЩАя╕П But the Delica held and I got up this giant Marri beast onto the timber mill and milled into slabs for counter tops and tables! The plan is to have Jarrah on the exterior of the house for decking etc and Marri on the interior of the house for posts and beams and so on! ЁЯШНЁЯк╡

item.title: My jaw almost hit the floor when I started getting quotes back f...
item.description:
View TikTok embed
View full post


My jaw almost hit the floor when I started getting quotes back for windows! ЁЯдп I knew straight away I needed to come up with a solution because if I had to pay over $70kAUD not including delivery or installation then I wouldnтАЩt have a house to put them in. ЁЯдн The saying тАШthey donтАЩt make them like they use toтАЩ rings very true to my experience in this world, So really it was a pretty easy decision for me to go with second hand antique Jarrah timber windows ЁЯкЯ IтАЩm making all my decking boards from Jarrah on my property so the windows will match in beautifully and itтАЩs such a high quality timber so if I restore them correctly they have another 50-100 years left in them! and with Jarrah being so expensive these days I feel very luxe too ЁЯШВЁЯШЭ
